prediction.reasoning: For AT&T (T), a large-cap telecom utility stock with relatively low volatility, I estimate minimal price movement over 1 day. Confidence intervals reflect increasing uncertainty ranges: 50% CI covers ±0.9% movement, 80% CI covers ±1.6% movement, and 90% CI covers ±2.4% movement from the point estimate.
